standard.label: Items
standard.children:
<Timeline.Item icon="file-alt">Request received</Timeline.Item>
<Timeline.Item icon="user" lineStyle="dotted">Assigned to reviewer</Timeline.Item>
<Timeline.Item icon="check">Approved</Timeline.Item>

children.default:
<Timeline.Item icon="file-alt">Request received</Timeline.Item>
<Timeline.Item icon="user" lineStyle="dotted">Assigned to reviewer</Timeline.Item>
<Timeline.Item icon="check">Approved</Timeline.Item>

presets.name: Default
presets.children:
<Timeline.Item icon="file-alt">Request received</Timeline.Item>
<Timeline.Item icon="user" lineStyle="dotted">Assigned to reviewer</Timeline.Item>
<Timeline.Item icon="check">Approved</Timeline.Item>

presets.name: Vertical
presets.children:
<Timeline.Item icon="file-alt">Request received</Timeline.Item>
<Timeline.Item icon="user">Assigned to reviewer</Timeline.Item>
<Timeline.Item icon="check">Approved</Timeline.Item>

presets.name: With Dates
presets.children:
<Timeline.Item date={new Date("2026-04-09T15:30:00.000Z")} icon="file-alt">Request received</Timeline.Item>
<Timeline.Item date={new Date("2026-04-10T15:30:00.000Z")} icon="user">Assigned to reviewer</Timeline.Item>
<Timeline.Item date={new Date("2026-04-11T15:30:00.000Z")} icon="check">Approved</Timeline.Item>

default.message: Default renders a horizontal timeline with three timeline items.

vertical.message: Vertical switches orientation for stacked process or activity views.

with_dates.message: With Dates enables date styling and passes Date values to each Timeline.Item.

gapped.message: Gapped combines vertical orientation with itemGap for more breathing room.

item_props.message: Item Props routes controls into the first Timeline.Item so item-level props render explicitly.
